answers: GitLab CI: built-in CI/CD in GitLab. Pipelines defined in .gitlab-ci.yml. All-in-one DevOps platform.
Learn gitlab ci through documentation, tutorials, and hands-on practice.
Gitlab Ci is widely used in the industry. Great tool to add to your skillset.
Getting started with gitlab ci: install, follow quickstart guide, and build a small project.

feelings.question: gitlab ci ki?
feelings.answer: Yes, GitLab CI is a widely used tool in the industry that allows developers to define and execute pipelines of build, test, and deployment tasks. It's built-in within GitLab and can be added to your skillset as it adds value to your DevOps workflow.
